arts.ttl: Man Utd Player Ratings vs. West Ham: Red Devils Open Summer Series With 2-1 Win
arts.sum: Rasmus Højlund, handed a start up top with Bruno Fernandes and summer signing Matheus Cunha playing in the pockets behind him, nearly sent the Man Utd support at MetLife Stadium into a frenzy in the opening minutes. Man Utd looked the sharper team in attack for the opening 20 minutes as Matheus Cunha, Fernandes and Højlund linked up around the edge of the box.

arts.ttl: Fernandes leads Man Utd past West Ham in N.J.
arts.sum: Manchester United kicked off their preseason tour of the U.S. with a 2-1 win over West Ham at MetLife Stadium on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Fernandes nets double as Man Utd beat West Ham
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes scored twice as Manchester United grabbed their first win of pre-season with a 2-1 victory over West Ham in the Summer Series.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes remains the top dog at Man United despite £130m arrivals, Rasmus Hojlund shows he's ready for a fight and the one area Red Devils must improve - SIX THINGS WE LEARNED from 2-1 win over West Ham
arts.sum: Manchester United may have spent more than £130million on Bryan Mbeumo and Matheus Cunha this summer, but Bruno Fernandes won't give up his status as the main man easily.

arts.ttl: Match report: Man Utd 2 West Ham 1
arts.sum: Amorim's side maintained the pressure after the interval and, within four minutes of the restart, Kilman was hassled out of possession by Hojlund, with Fernandes bursting clear to face Areola in a one-on-one situation. Fernandes collected a pass and floated a quite beautiful finish, taking advantage of Areola being a little out of position with unerring accuracy and precision.

arts.ttl: Man Utd finally give Ruben Amorim signs of encouragement - 5 talking points vs West Ham
arts.sum: Manchester United kicked off their preseason adventure in the United States with a win over West Ham to give Ruben Amorim some signs of encouragement ahead of the season

arts.ttl: Man United vs West Ham LIVE: Premier League duo battle it out in the States with £71m summer signing Bryan Mbeumo made to wait for his Red Devils debut after prolonged transfer tussle
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester United take on West Ham United in a preseason friendly at the MetLife Stadium in New Jersey

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd v West Ham - TV channel, live stream and start time
arts.sum: Manchester United take on West Ham in the Premier League Summer Series mini-tournament this weekend, with the Red Devils and the Hammers looking to continue their preparations for the fresh season

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs West Ham: TV channel, live stream, unusual kick-off time
arts.sum: Manchester United and West Ham clash in the Premier League Summer Series mini-tournament in the United States on Sunday, as Ruben Amorim and Graham Potter ready their respective sides for 2025/26
